15 /*****************************************************************************/
Model.h
Contains the class representing an entire Scene, or Model.
Geometry.h
Geometry helpers, such as skybox generations.
PODReader.h
An AssetReader that reads POD format streams and creates pvr::assets::Model objects out of them...
BoundingBox.h
Functionality to extract and work with the Bounding Boxes of PVRAssets (meshes etc.)
Helper.h
Internal helper classes.
